system.description: All bindings lose their strength when you’re around. Tug at an invisible thread connected to an object within 3 meters of you and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
the target completely
disassembles: its locks open, its
seams come apart, its knots come
undone, its screws come loose.
outcomes.every3rd3:
choose one:
  • Your range increases by three meters.
  • Any number of things within your current range undergo this effect.
  • It is easy to put the target back together.
outcomes.failure:
things fall apart wherever you go: lights fall from the ceiling, cables on cranes snap when you pass below them, your shoes come untied. The GM receives the following Chaos Effect until the Mission is over.
  • Unspool (1 Chaos) Something comes completely undone in a way that inconveniences the player who gave you this ability

improvement.question: When I don't want to do something I'm expected to do, I...

answer2.text: Cause enough drama that it gets canceled.
